title: Aquatic Frontiers
body:
Welcome To The Aquatic Frontiers MOD!

This MOD adds various new aquatic entities to the game to liven up the oceans!

This MOD adds five new entities; The Sponge Squid, Sandy, Coral Golem, Giant Squid and Coral Crab

Each new entity contains custom loot tables, spawning conditions and behaviours

 

MOD Is Currently Available For Version 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20.1 & 1.20.4

If you have any bugs, issues or feature requests; please use the issue tracker

REQUIRES GECKOLIB

Textures, Models and Animations by CaptainAtlas

Coding By GlitchedMastery
